title: types: Chat field updates (receiveTypingIndicators, receiptSharing)
description:
## What
Spec changes (IMPROVEMENTS.md §3):
- Add receiveTypingIndicators: bool (default true) — per-chat typing suppression preference
- Add receiptSharing: Option<bool> — per-chat receipt sharing override; absent = use account-level PresenceStatus.receiptSharing

## Tests
Fixture tests/fixtures/types/chat_with_typing_fields.json: chat with both new fields set
Assert: receiveTypingIndicators defaults to true when absent from JSON (use #[serde(default = 'default_true')] pattern)
Assert: receiptSharing: None when absent
Assert: receiptSharing: Some(false) when present as false
